de.uka.ilkd.key.prover

Interface ProverCore

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractProverCore, ApplyStrategy

    public interface ProverCore

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static java.lang.String PROCESSING_STRATEGY
      constant used by some listeners to determine if a proof macro is running

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addProverTaskObserver(ProverTaskListener observer)
      adds a task listener
      void clear()
      Used by, e.g., InteractiveProver.clear() in order to prevent memory leaking.
      boolean hasBeenInterrupted()
      Returns true iff the last run has been stopped due to a received InterruptedException.
      void removeProverTaskObserver(ProverTaskListener observer)
      removes a task listener
      ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof, Goal goal)
      starts a proof search for a given goals using the given strategy settings instead the ones configures in the proof
      ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
      starts a proof search for a set of goals using the given strategy settings instead the ones configures in the proof
      ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals, int maxSteps, long timeout, boolean stopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal)
      This entry point to the proof may provide inconsistent data.
      ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals, StrategySettings stratSet)
      starts a proof search for a set of goals using the given strategy settings instead the ones configures in the proof

    • Field Detail

      • PROCESSING_STRATEGY

        static final java.lang.String PROCESSING_STRATEGY
        constant used by some listeners to determine if a proof macro is running
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • start

        ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof,
                        Goal goal)
        starts a proof search for a given goals using the given strategy settings instead the ones configures in the proof
        Parameters:
        proof - the Proof instance
        goal - the goal to prove
        Returns:
        an information object about the performed work (e.g. number of rules applied)

      • start

        ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof,
                        ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
        starts a proof search for a set of goals using the given strategy settings instead the ones configures in the proof
        Parameters:
        proof - the Proof instance
        goals - list of goals to prove
        Returns:
        an information object about the performed work (e.g. number of rules applied)

      • start

        ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof,
                        ImmutableList<Goal> goals,
                        StrategySettings stratSet)
        starts a proof search for a set of goals using the given strategy settings instead the ones configures in the proof
        Parameters:
        proof - the Proof instance
        goals - list of goals to prove
        stratSet - the strategy settings to use
        Returns:
        an information object about the performed work (e.g. number of rules applied)

      • start

        ApplyStrategyInfo start(Proof proof,
                        ImmutableList<Goal> goals,
                        int maxSteps,
                        long timeout,
                        boolean stopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal)
        This entry point to the proof may provide inconsistent data. The properties within the proof may differ to the explicit data. This is discouraged. starts a proof search for a set of goals
        Parameters:
        proof - the Proof instance
        goals - list of goals to prove
        maxSteps - an int with the maximal number of rule applications to be performed
        timeout - a long with a timeout when tyo stop the proof search at latest
        stopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal - true if the prover shall stop at the first encountered non-closable goal
        Returns:
        an information object about the performed work (e.g. number of rules applied)

      • addProverTaskObserver

        void addProverTaskObserver(ProverTaskListener observer)
        adds a task listener
        Parameters:
        observer - the listener to add

      • removeProverTaskObserver

        void removeProverTaskObserver(ProverTaskListener observer)
        removes a task listener
        Parameters:
        observer - the listener to remove

      • clear

        void clear()
        Used by, e.g., InteractiveProver.clear() in order to prevent memory leaking. When a proof obligation is abandoned all references to the proof must be reset.

      • hasBeenInterrupted

        boolean hasBeenInterrupted()
        Returns true iff the last run has been stopped due to a received InterruptedException. This exception would have been swallowed by the system. However, the cancelled flag is set in this case which allows detection of such a condition.
        Returns:
        whether the last run has been interrupted
